title: Make Data Count: Emerging Priorities and Practical Steps in Data Evaluation
author: Puebla, Iratxe

description:
Slides for the session 'Make Data Count: Emerging Priorities and Practical Steps in Data Evaluation' as part of the DataCite Community Meeting 2024. 
 A recording of the presentation can be found here:  https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=7uqcovfkexE&t=0s
